item.title: n8n vs Node-RED vs Activepieces: Best Self-Hosted Workflow Automation in 2026
item.description: Compare n8n, Node-RED, and Activepieces — the top three open-source workflow automation platforms for 2026. Docker deployment guides, feature comparisons, and performance benchmarks.
